## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX Labs' Q1 plan and proposal for Reddit, focusing on SOW review and strategic growth initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SOW outlines key growth lanes: editorial content, programmatic COPs, influencer/agency program, and link building](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Influencer/agency program seen as unique opportunity for awareness, sign-ups, and agency reach](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Time sensitivity: GrowthX contract ends Jan 18; team on break Dec 24-Jan 6](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [GrowthX plans to invest heavily in dedicated team members for Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)

## Topics

### SOW Overview and Content Strategies

  - [Editorial content and programmatic COPs targeting 3,000 pages (minimum)](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Focus on templatization to increase efficiency and volume](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Content repurposing, nurture sequences, and automated emails planned](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Localization experiments proposed, targeting city-level content and small business ecosystems](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Influencer and Agency Program

  - [Unique approach combining distribution, access, and AI outbound](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Goals: drive awareness, mindshare, direct sign-ups, and agency reach](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Strategy: recruit influencers for co-created content and webinars](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Emphasis on growth stories "brought to you by Reddit" rather than solely Reddit-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)

### Localized Growth Strategy

  - [Inspired by successful app growth models (e.g., Tinder's campus approach)](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Target influential local business organizations (e.g., Chambers of Commerce, Hispanic business associations)](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Create "domino effect" by influencing micro-influencers in smaller communities](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Scale through hyper-focused approach, moving from one locality to the next](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)

### Link Building Initiative

  - [Aim for 20-30 high domain authority backlinks per month](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Leverage Reddit's desirability as a backlink source](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Focus on strategic, high-value targets for maximum impact](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Team and Resource Allocation

  - [GrowthX planning to hire and dedicate more team members to Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Seeking clarity on scope to inform investment decisions](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Current contract ends January 18, adding time sensitivity to discussions](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)

## Next Steps

  - Marcel to send SOW PDF in the channel for review

  - [Brian to provide potential meeting times that work for Reddit team](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [GrowthX to proceed with hiring and team allocation plans](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Both parties to work towards finalizing agreement before holiday break (Dec 24 - Jan 6)](https://fathom.video/share/PhHuqxbm1ysCyJmKUWzZB3eQXxUmT8ML?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
